LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE LAW OFFICES OF OLUMIDE K. OBAYEMI'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF HO'S CONSTRUCTION INCMM IS OFF CALENDAR. COUNSEL FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S ORDER ISSUED ON FEBRUARY 13, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

OBAYEMI'S AMENDED MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF HO'S CONSTRUCTION INCORPORATED IS OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP 1005(B). THE AMENDED MOTION WAS FILED AND SERVED ON FEBRUARY 14, 2014. MOVING PARTY ONLY PROVIDED 6 COURT DAYS NOTICE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE LAW OFFICES OF OLUMIDE K. OBAYEMI'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF HO'S CONSTRUCTION INCORPORATED IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 25, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 13, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
